title: Lost Treasure of the Emerald Eye
titleZh: 绿宝石之眼的失落宝藏
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's sister Thea drags him on a treasure hunt for the Emerald Eye — with cousin Trap and nephew Benjamin along for chaos! 💎

title: The Curse of the Cheese Pyramid
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is sent to Egypt to report on the pyramids and meets a wacky professor with a smelly secret invention! 🐫

title: Cat and Mouse in a Haunted House
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo gets lost in the foggy Dark Forest and spends a spooky Halloween night in a creepy castle full of cats and 'ghosts'! 👻

title: I'm Too Fond of My Fur!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves the freezing Himalayas to help his friend Professor von Volt and meets a hidden family of gentle yetis! 🐱

title: Four Mice Deep in the Jungle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked by his family into a jungle survival school where he faces his fears and becomes a brave little mouse! 🌴

title: Paws Off, Cheddarface!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's sneaky rival hires a look-alike to steal his newspaper and his good name, but with his family's help he gets everything back! 🧀

title: Red Pizzas for a Blue Count
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family rush to a spooky castle to rescue cousin Trap, only to find he's fine — and that the creepy count and countess are really bats who love bug pizzas! 🍕

title: Attack of the Bandit Cats
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family are captured by pirate cats but outsmart them with a clever trick and sail home with stolen treasure! 🏴‍☠️

title: A Fabumouse Vacation for Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo just wants a cool, quiet vacation, but one disaster after another keeps him stuck at work — until he finally ends up at the silly Ratty Tatty Hotel with his noisy assistant Pinky! 🏖️

title: All Because of a Cup of Coffee
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a spilled cup of coffee makes Geronimo fall for a countess, a wild family trip to find a legendary cheese valley teaches him what really matters! ☕

title: It's Halloween, You 'Fraidy Mouse!
titleZh: 万圣节快乐，胆小鬼老鼠！
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must write a Halloween book in just one day while his spooky family and a crypt-loving mouse make him jump with fright! 🎃

title: Merry Christmas, Geronimo!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Christmas Eve, Geronimo's house catches fire but his clever family saves the party just in time! 🎄

title: The Phantom of the Subway
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves the dark subway tunnels to find the phantom cat, which turns out to be a robot! 🐱

title: The Temple of the Ruby of Fire
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo joins Professor von Volt in the Amazon to find a lost Incan ruby guarded by monkeys and a snake! 💎

title: The Mona Mousa Code
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo cracks a secret code hidden in a famous painting to find a lost underground library! 🔍

title: A Cheese-Colored Camper
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's cranky grandfather drags the family to freezing Ratzikistan in his cheese-colored camper — and they discover a delicious new cheese! 🚐

title: Watch Your Whiskers, Stilton!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: A one-eyed rival tries to ruin Geronimo's newspaper, so he goes on a deadly game show to win a million dollars and save the day! 📰

title: Shipwreck on the Pirate Islands
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's family survives a plane crash on a pirate island, dodges sharks and ghosts, and finds a golden pirate ship! 🏴‍☠️

title: My Name Is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton
titleZh: 我叫斯蒂顿，杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's loud new 14-year-old assistant Pinky Pick throws his life into chaos — and a North Pole New Year's party changes him forever! 🕶️

title: Surf's Up, Geronimo!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked into a terrible vacation full of sharks, cockroaches, and crazy stunts — but he survives to tell the tale! 🏄

title: The Wild, Wild West
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is dragged to the Wild West, where he must tame a fierce bull to free a thirsty town from a water-stealing outlaw! 🤠

title: The Secret Of Cacklefur Castle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is kidnapped by Creepella to a spooky castle, where a surprise adoption warms even his frightened fur! 🏰

title: Valentine's Day Disaster
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Valentine's Day everything goes wrong until a cowmouse named Cheesy Lou helps Geronimo throw the best party ever! 💝

title: Field Trip to Niagara Falls
titleZh: 尼亚加拉大瀑布实地考察
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo takes Benjamin's class to Niagara Falls, where he becomes a hero and watches a teacher find her lost love! 🌊

title: The Search for Sunken Treasure
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo joins his family hunting a sunken ship's treasure, outwits greedy rivals, and finds aged cheese! 💎

title: The Mummy With No Name
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a spooky mummy haunts the Egyptian Mouseum, Geronimo and his friends uncover a thief in disguise and a pharaoh's sweet lost love! 🏺

title: The Christmas Toy Factory
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When Santa catches the measles, Geronimo must fly the reindeer and deliver every Christmas toy — and learn what the holiday is really about! 🎄

title: Wedding Crasher
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When Geronimo crashes his stingy uncle's wedding, he finds hidden gold, a plain bride in need of a makeover, and a cousin who is up to no good! 💍

title: Down And Out Down Under
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is swept from his office to the wild wonders of Australia — surfing, sacred red rocks, and new friends! 🇦🇺

title: The Mouse Island Marathon
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo trains hard and wins a crazy 26.2-mile race after many wild adventures! 🏃

title: The Mysterious Cheese Thief
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to England with his family to solve the mystery of who stole all the Stilton cheese — and discovers the thief is a clever mouse named the Shadow! 🧀

title: Valley of the Giant Skeleton
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family trek to the Gobi Desert to find Uncle Wally's hidden treasure — and discover a giant dinosaur skeleton guarded by a sneaky old enemy! 🦖

title: Geronimo and the Gold Medal
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo covers the Olympics in Athens and teams up with detective Hercule Poirat to catch a cheating count who wins gold medals with a sneaky animal-power machine! 🥇

title: Geronimo Stilton, Secret Agent
titleZh: 杰罗尼摩·斯提尔顿，秘密特工
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's old school friend turns out to be a secret agent and helps him chase a very important lost envelope all across New Mouse City! 🕵️

title: A Very Merry Christmas
titleZh: 一个非常快乐的圣诞节
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo loses his suitcase at the New York airport and races all over the city to find its owner — with a fun surprise waiting at the end! 🎄

title: Geronimo's Valentine
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Valentine's Day Geronimo's date goes hilariously wrong, then he and Hercule solve a cheesecake painting mystery! 💌

title: The Race Across America
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Bruce Hyena signs Geronimo up for a 3,000-mile bike race across America, all for a good cause! 🚴

title: A Fabumouse School Adventure
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves a chaotic Career Day at his nephew's school and ends up being honored as the school's most famous graduate! 🏫

title: Singing Sensation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo becomes a singing star on Mouse Island Idol, then teams up with detective Hercule to catch a cat pirate stealing his music! 🎤

title: The Karate Mouse
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo trains in karate and surprises everyone by winning the World Championship in San Mouscisco! 🥋

title: Mighty Mount Kilimanjaro
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is dragged by his athletic friend Bruce to climb Africa's tallest mountain — Mount Kilimanjaro! 🏔️

title: The Peculiar Pumpkin Thief
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Halloween, a mysterious clown thief locks the whole city inside Mystery Park — can Geronimo and Hercule stop him? 🎃

title: I'm Not a Supermouse!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Bruce trains scaredy-mouse Geronimo through desert, poles, jungle and caves — and he learns he's no supermouse, just brave! 💪

title: The Giant Diamond Robbery
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo goes undercover at a golf tournament to stop a thief from stealing a giant diamond on a golden cup! 💎

title: Save the White Whale!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo helps rescue a rare white whale and turns the polluted bay into a protected park! 🐋

title: The Haunted Castle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo unravels his uncle's fake haunted-castle scheme and helps two stingy families find love and friendship! 🏰

title: Run for the Hills, Geronimo!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's relaxing Black Hills vacation turns into a wild treasure hunt with family, friends, and a mountain lion! 🏔️

title: The Mystery in Venice
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: A note hidden in a crystal gondola sends Geronimo to Venice to solve a wedding mystery! 🚤

title: The Way of the Samurai
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to Japan to help his friend Wild Willie protect an ancient karate secret hidden in a samurai castle! 🥷

title: This Hotel Is Haunted
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and detective Hercule Poirat spend a spooky night at the Grand Hotel to unmask the ghost scaring away the guests! 👻

title: The Enormouse Pearl Heist
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo finds a giant glowing pearl inside a rare ocean oyster and must stop thieves from stealing it! 🦪

title: Mouse in Space!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo becomes a secret agent and rockets into space to stop an evil rodent's plan to rob New Mouse City! 🚀

title: Rumble in the Jungle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked into a wild Brazilian adventure to help the Bororo save their glowing Heart of Light! 🌴

title: Get Into Gear, Stilton!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must renew his driver's license and teams up with Solar, a talking robot car, to recover a stolen diamond necklace! 🚗

title: The Golden Statue Plot
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: The pirate cats sail to Mouse Island to steal the golden Statue of Liberty, but clever mice and a flea army send them packing! 🏆

title: Flight of the Red Bandit
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo flies to the deserts of Arizona to find the mysterious Red Bandit and bring home a very special hat! ✈️

title: The Stinky Cheese Vacation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked by his stingy uncle into fixing up a crumbling castle — and ends up finding a stinky cheese treasure! 🧀

title: The Super Chef Contest
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Trap cheats in the Super Chef Contest, but when his freezer fails Geronimo must cook honestly to win the Golden Fork! 🍳

title: Welcome to Moldy Manor
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Trap tricks Geronimo into spending everything, so Grandfather sends him to stingy Uncle Samuel's Moldy Manor to learn about saving! 🏚️

title: The Treasure of Easter Island
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his friends follow a secret map to mysterious Easter Island to rescue Thea and uncover an ancient treasure 🗿

title: Mouse House Hunter
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo must sell his cozy house to save The Rodent's Gazette, then race to win it back from his rival Sally 🏠

title: Mouse Overboard!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo sails to Portugal to relive Vasco da Gama's voyage — and must catch the saboteur on board before it's too late 🚢

title: Geronimo Stilton
titleZh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿（特别篇）
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When blue spots break out across New Mouse City, Geronimo and his friends race to find a cure before every tail falls off! 🐭

title: Magical Mission
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo goes undercover in London to solve the mystery of a roaring bronze lion — and ends up winning a magic contest! 🐭

title: Bollywood Burglary
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked into a Bollywood movie to guard a famous ruby — but a crafty thief still strikes at the wedding! 🐭

title: Operation Secret Recipe
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo races around Milan to catch a look-alike thief and recover the stolen secret panettone recipe! 🎂

title: The Chocolate Chase
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo bikes all over town to recover the stolen golden Mousebergé Egg before the Spring Festival opens! 🍫

title: Cyber-Thief Showdown
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's accounts are hacked, so he dives into a virtual pirate game to catch the sneaky cyber-thief Nick Nobody! 💻

title: Hug a Tree, Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo buys his childhood farm to protect the legendary Great Oak from a greedy company that wants to build a mall. 🌳

title: The Hawaiian Heist
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to Hawaii to help his friend Hercule protect a jeweled lei necklace, but a disguised spy steals a fake while the real one stays hidden 🌺

title: The Missing Movie
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a famous director's only copy of his secret film vanishes at the New Mouse City Film Festival, Geronimo and Hercule must catch the thief 🎬

title: Happy Birthday, Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On his birthday, Geronimo is framed with fake money and must team up with Hercule to catch the counterfeiting Bamboozle family 🎂

title: The Sticky Situation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's farm honey wins big, but robotic bees and a fake-honey rival run by Madame No threaten everything 🐝
